canonical_definition: The latent trait enabling an AI agent to align its communication and actions with the goals, values, and standards of a specific professional role, such as a doctor, beyond mere information provision.
papers: Dynamic Collaboration of Multi-Language Models based on Minimal Complete Semantic Units
